overviewPartialError: Failed to load some data — some counters may be incomplete.
archonActivityHint: The Archon's action history in the audit log — pre-filtered by archon_aid.
archonAidError: format: lowercase letters/digits/._@-, at least 2 chars (e.g. alice@corp.com, ops-bob)
archonNoRoles: The Archon has no roles. Assign them via RBAC → Archon assignments.
archonNoSynods: The Archon is not a member of any group.
backendUnsupported: backend does not support this feature
builtinDeleteDenied: builtin role — deletion is denied by the server
builtinEditDenied: builtin role — editing is denied by the server
cancelErrandRunHint: Active Errands will run to natural completion. No new Errands from the queue will be started.
cancelVoyageHint: The run will be cancelled. Already started apply blocks may complete on their own.
deleteDecreeConfirm: Delete Decree {{name}}? Cooldown state (oracle_fires) will be cascade-cleared.
deleteVigilConfirm: Delete Vigil {{name}}? Decrees are NOT cascaded.
deprecatedBanner: This page is deprecated. Use the Run Wizard.
jwtIssued: JWT issued. Copy it now — it will not be shown again.
noRoles: No roles in the cluster. Create the first one via “Create role”.
revokeSigilConfirm:
Revoke Sigil grant {{sigil}}?
The binary will no longer pass Sigil verification. The record stays in the registry for audit.
